PostToolUse.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.go) cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && go vet ./... 2>&1 | head -20;; esac
PostToolUse.description: Run go vet after Go file edits

PreToolUse.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.age|*.key) echo 'BLOCK: Encrypted/key files should not be edited directly' && exit 1;; esac
PreToolUse.description: Block edits to encrypted and key files

PreToolUse.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *go.sum) echo 'BLOCK: go.sum should not be edited directly — use go mod tidy' && exit 1;; esac
